articles.title: India Raises Diesel, Gasoline Prices for Third Time in Eight Days
articles.summary: India’s state-run refiners raised retail prices again of diesel and gasoline on Saturday to help processors cut losses on discounted sales and to control a spike in demand.

articles.title: Ebola Outruns Containment in Eastern Congo as Contact Tracing Falters
articles.summary: Ebola is spreading faster than responders can track it in eastern Congo, where health workers managed to follow up with barely one in five identified contacts in a single day.
